roa.docketEntryComment: DA REPLY TO DEF OPPO TO PEOPLE MOT TO CONSOLIDATE FILED
PD MOTION IN OPP TO DA MOT CONSOLIDATE FILED
PPLS NOTICE OF MOT & MOT TO AMEND COMPLAINT

/CAL: TRAILING DEJ #19015957/DAWT/FAVRPT/BE/X: THE PEOPLE MAKE AN ORAL1001,95 & 1001,97 MOTION/MO GRTD/1001,97: 1/CTORD: PETITIONER'S RECORD OF THIS ARREST IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BE SEALED, INCLUDINGALL RECORDS OF THE ARRESTING AGENCY AND RELATED COURT FILED AND RECORDS, PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTIONS 1001,95 AND 1001,97/X: PHYSICAL ORDER WAS OFFERED TO BE SIGNED/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT ON AMENDED AND CONSOLIDATED COMPLAINT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TODEMURR,/GTWM/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/SB:2 HOURS/
/CAL:DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE COMPLAINT/DAWT/X:DA MOTION IS GRANTED/X:CONSOLIDATION WITH DOCKET #19015957 IS FILED/X:AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT ON COMPLAINTS/DOP/

/CAL:PEOPLE'S MOTION TO AMEND AND CONSOLIDATE/X:THE COURT GRANTS THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT/AMEND:COUNT 1, A VIOLATION OF PC 273,6(A) A MISDEMEANOR/TBH:19015957/CONTD: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE & ARRAIGNMENT ON AMENDED COMPLAINT/SB:2HRS/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/987,2/SA1:HATTI FLANAGAN/SA2:250 MCALLISTER ST, SF CA 94102/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/SB:2 HOURS/
/CAL:MATTER TRAILING DEJ IN #19015957/X:DEFENDANT PRESENT VIA ZOOM/CONT/DOPU:PTD/
/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/X:DEJ ENTERED ON CONSOLIDATED CASE # 19015957/CONTD:TO TRAIL 06-08-21/DOPU:PTD/ /CONTD:POSSIBLE DISMISSAL 11-4-21/DOPU:PTD/
/CAL:DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASES/DAWT/CONT/X:DEFENDANT REMAINS ON 2 HOUR STANDBY,/
